basic_details.short_information: Rail Vikas Nigam Limited (RVNL) Project Manager Notification 2026 has been released on [Release Date] on the official website [official website]. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the RVNL Project Manager Recruitment 2026. Candidates aged up to 55 years who have a Graduate in Civil Engineering with 15 years of experience (including 5 years as in-charge of similar works) are eligible to apply for this Project Manager position. The walk-in interview for the RVNL Project Manager Recruitment 2026 will be held on 26 May 2026. Candidates can find more details and attend the interview a

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 55 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per Govt. of India guidelines issued from time to time in regards to SC/ST/OBC/PwBDs/Ex-Servicemen.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate in Civil Engg. Minimum Total experience of 15 years, out of which, minimum 05 years as In-charge of similar works
qualification.details: Project Manager: Graduate in Civil Engg. Minimum Total experience of 15 years, out of which, minimum 05 years as In-charge of similar works.

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for the RVNL recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for the Rail Vikas Nigam Limited (RVNL) recruitment is Project Manager. This is a contract-based position.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Project Manager post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Manager post in the Rail Vikas Nigam Limited (RVNL) recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview in person with all required documents.

faq.question: Q4. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: The last date to attend the walk-in interview for the Project Manager post is 26th May 2026. Candidates must ensure they reach the venue on or before this date.

faq.question: Q5. What is the minimum qualification required for the Project Manager position?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required is a Graduate degree in Civil Engineering, along with a minimum of 15 years of total experience, out of which 5 years must be as In-charge of similar works.

faq.question: Q6. What is the maximum age limit for the Project Manager post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Manager post is 55 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per government guidelines.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for this recruitment. Candidates from all categories, including General, OBC, SC, and ST, are not required to pay any fee.

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary offered for the Project Manager role?
faq.answer: The salary for the Project Manager position is negotiable. Candidates will discuss their remuneration during the interview process.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for the RVNL Project Manager recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves an initial screening by a committee, followed by a walk-in interview. Candidates must clear both stages to be considered.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the walk-in interview venue?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held in New Delhi, Delhi, with the pincode 110029. Candidates should report to the specified RVNL office.
